$comment: SUPERSEDED PROTOTYPE — the v1 declarative schema this anticipated now ships for real: see packages/draw-bundle/src/panels/stroke-panel.ts (a SchemaPanelContribution contributed through host.contribute.schemaPanel, B-01 RESOLVED). This JSON form is kept only as the historical design record. The real panel uses the catalog widget ids (paged.input.numeric-scrub / color-swatch / toggle-group) and drives the dash section's visibility from a PUBLISHED binding (dashControlsVisible) the bundle computes from selection — the derived-bound-value resolution B-01 recorded, NOT a visibleWhen conditional.

sections.$comment: Paper had visibleWhen strokeType == dashed. The catalog forbids conditionals; the real panel exposes a derived 'dashControlsVisible' bound value from plugin state, or ships as an expert leaf. Engine gap: no dash-pattern PropertyPath yet (B-12).
